productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Classy Red Sandals
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these classy sandals from carlton london. The stylish metallic midfoot chain makes this a fab addition to your party wardrobe. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic leather straps with a silk outer on the forefoot and around the ankle Metallic chain attached to the forefoot and midfoot strap Buckle closure along the ankle strap Synthetic leather footbed with a foot patch Outsole TPR outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot for grip Raised heel for style Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
